title: Rules
intro: Review both rule sets below before continuing.
discordRules: Be respectful to members and staff.
No harassment, discrimination, or disruptive behavior.
Keep content appropriate for the server.
Do not spam, advertise, or abuse pings.
Follow staff instructions when moderation is involved.
inGameRules: Use realistic roleplay at all times.
Do not random deathmatch or grief other players.
No exploiting, cheating, or abusing game systems.
Follow scene priorities and staff directions.
Keep your roleplay fair, believable, and immersive.
